entity.summary: Japanese centralized cryptocurrency exchange providing brokerage and order-book trading, crypto derivatives, deposits and withdrawals, staking and lending services, mobile and web trading tools, and public and authenticated APIs.
entity.notes: Current first-party website exposes brokerage, exchange, crypto-FX, staking, lending, market, account, and trading-tool surfaces and identifies GMO Coin, Inc. as a registered Japanese crypto-asset exchange operator under Kanto Finance Bureau registration 00006. Current first-party API documentation covers public market data, authenticated trading and account operations, REST and WebSocket access, and a change history extending through June 2026.

evidence.title: GMO Coin official exchange website
evidence.notes: Current first-party website exposes brokerage, order-book exchange, crypto-FX, deposits and withdrawals, staking, lending, market data, mobile and web trading tools, registration, and login. The footer identifies GMO Coin, Inc. and Kanto Finance Bureau crypto-asset exchange registration 00006.

evidence.title: GMO Coin cryptocurrency API documentation
evidence.notes: Current first-party documentation covers exchange status, tickers, order books, trades, KLine data, public WebSocket feeds, balances, deposits and withdrawals, orders, positions, authenticated REST and WebSocket APIs, and a change history extending through 2026-06-27.
